name: 365 Golf - Learn, Enjoy & Play
about: 365 Golf is an indoor golf simulator venue featuring four full-size advanced simulators. The facility caters to a range of golfers, offering both individual and corporate memberships alongside pay-per-play options for non-members. Services include private lessons, group classes for adults and juniors, and event hosting capabilities. The venue utilizes GS Pro software with access to over 1,800 virtual courses, allowing for flexible gameplay from quick 18-hole rounds to extensive practice sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Unlimited bay access with membership plans
Comprehensive training facilities including Smash It Room
Flexible booking options for members and guests

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on-site
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You may bring your own clubs. A small selection of clubs is available for borrowing if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: No information provided regarding food or drink policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: An individual can play 18 holes in 45 minutes to 1 hour. Two players can warm up and complete 18 holes in roughly 2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior golf classes, camps, and is suitable for family events.
